creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text:
It's looks exactly like routing loop as I have told. Look here:
> [B1] IPCP: LayerUp
> [B1]  194.85.82.184 --> 193.125.142.233
                           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
And here:
%host vpdn-campus.mipt.ru
vpdn-campus.mipt.ru has address 193.125.142.233
                                 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

They MUST be different! Your PPTP server configured wrong!

PPTP packets going to the server IP MUST go outside of tunnel, but not 
inside of it as it will be after assigning that gateway IP given to you 
to the interface. To fix the freeze you have to make something to this 
routing problem. One of ways is using 'ipfw fwd' to manually forward 
packets to the right way.

-- 
Alexander Motin
